chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 51 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.6277/2025 (151 CPC) 3. For hearing of CMA No.251/2023 (S/A) 4. For hearing of main case. 03-10-2025 Mian Mumtaz Rabbani, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Sanwan Khan Jagirani, Advocate for Respondents 2to6/SIDA Mr. Maqsood Ahmed Leghari, Advocate for Respondent No.4 Syed Tanveer Abbas Shah, Advocate for Respondent No.10 Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for Respondents No.12 to 14 Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh >>>>>>..<<<<<< Mr. Abdul Mujeeb Shaikh, Advocate also files vakalatnama of SDO, SEPCO, Salehpat on behalf of Respondent No.10, which is taken on record. Learned Counsel for respondents / SIDA submits that the petitioner is getting proper share of water; and there are some other 160 sanctioned water lifting machines, which are also taking their own share of water, which are not affecting the petitioner. However, learned counsel for the Petitioner submits that the Petitioner is not being provided proper share of water from the watercourse. On this, Counsel for the respondents/SIDA submits that the lands of the Petitioner are situated on the head of the watercourse and he is getting the water share without any hindrance. Under the circumstances, the Petition is disposed of along with pending applications. However, the respondents are directed to take immediate action, if any, illegal water lifting machine is installed in the water course. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
